title: My Garage
description: Manage your cars and use them to auto-fill parts requests.
register_desc: Fill in the details below to add a car to your digital garage.
error_desc: We couldn't reach the garage at the moment. Please check your connection.
empty_desc: Add your vehicles now to make finding spare parts 5x faster.

actions.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this vehicle from your garage?

toasts.add_error: Failed to add vehicle. Please try again.

tip.title: Maintenance Reminders
tip.desc: Soon you'll be able to track oil changes and inspection dates directly from your garage.

history.title: Service History
history.desc: View all parts requested and quotes accepted for each of your vehicles in one place.
